title: linum suffruticosum var. scabrum
intro: Linum suffruticosum var. scabrum, also known as prickly flax, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the flax family (Linaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and soothing properties. Herbal preparations of Linum suffruticosum var. scabrum can be made into teas, infusions, or salves for topical use, and it can also be consumed as a dietary supplement.
